name: dk-marketplace
description: Curated Claude Code plugins for project management, testing, documentation, and developer workflows

plugins.name: apollo
plugins.description: Agent-agnostic project lifecycle manager. Encodes dev preferences into YAML config and syncs rules across Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Codex, and Aider.

plugins.name: carto
plugins.description: Intent-aware codebase intelligence. Scans codebases, builds layered semantic index using LLMs, stores in Memories MCP. Produces skill files for instant AI agent context.

plugins.name: claude-code-restart
plugins.description: Self-restart mechanism for Claude Code. Adds /restart slash command and a shell wrapper that catches SIGHUP and restarts with --continue.

plugins.name: delphi
plugins.description: Comprehensive test scenario generator and executor for any software. Generate guided cases and run them via browser automation or programmatic verification.

plugins.name: hermes
plugins.description: Audience-specific documentation generator for internal (CS/Support), external (users/developers), and marketing (sales/PMM) audiences.

plugins.name: learning-skill
plugins.description: Automatically captures learnings from failures and fixes during Claude Code sessions. Includes a stop hook for passive extraction from transcripts.

plugins.name: skill-conductor
plugins.description: Skill orchestration layer for Claude Code. Routes tasks to the right pipeline and sequences skills through phases.

plugins.name: think-different
plugins.description: On-demand lateral thinking mode. When straight-line problem-solving fails, applies 15 thinking frameworks (First Principles, Inversion, SCAMPER, 5 Whys, etc.) to reframe the problem.

plugins.name: ui-val
plugins.description: Visual UI validation after code changes. Use after editing frontend files to catch layout, spacing, and rendering issues.

plugins.name: update-checker
plugins.description: Check for updates to installed plugins, MCP servers, and hooks. Runs on session start and via /check-updates.

plugins.name: pencil-prototyping
plugins.description: Launch Pencil.dev on demand and prototype visuals on a canvas. Use when you need mockups, wireframes, or visual designs.

plugins.name: kalos
plugins.description: Format-agnostic design governance tool — define design tokens and rules, enforce them across Pencil, Tailwind, and more

plugins.name: argos
plugins.description: The All-Seeing Issue Guardian — watches GitHub repos and acts on issues within configurable boundaries

plugins.name: pheme
plugins.description: Universal communication layer -- agents notify humans across any channel

plugins.name: memories
plugins.description: Self-hosted semantic memory with 5-signal hybrid search (BM25 + vector + recency + feedback + confidence), operator workbench, lifecycle policies, and full audit trail
